chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4116 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.23796/2024. 3. For hearing of CMA No.18157/2024. 4. For haring of main case. 13.10.2025 Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. ------------- Petitioner is present in Court and has informed that he has now retired. He now seeks proforma promotion, which was not included in the prayer clause of the present petition. Accordingly, learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, seeks to withdraw this petition, which is accordingly disposed of as withdrawn. However, he may, if so advised, file a fresh petition for prforma promotion. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
